creator: eng@prowip.net.br
text:
#dmesg
pcm0: <NVidia MCP61B High Definition Audio Controller> mem 
0xf5100000-0xf5103fff irq 23 at device 5.0 on pci0

pcm0: <HDA Codec: Realtek ALC883>
pcm0: <HDA Driver Revision: 20070710_0047>

#pciconf
pcm0@pci0:5:0:  class=0x040300 card=0xa0021458 chip=0x03f010de rev=0xa2 
hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'NVIDIA Corporation'
    class      = multimedia

#mixer
Mixer vol      is currently set to  35:35
Mixer pcm      is currently set to  11:11
Mixer line     is currently set to  51:51
Mixer mic      is currently set to 100:100
Mixer cd       is currently set to  67:67
Mixer rec      is currently set to 100:100
Recording source: mic


I have the same hardware and it does not work. I have a dualboot with stable 
and current and on 7.0 it does not work either. 
Also the pcm volume controle is hard to control, it practically starts on the 
first levels very loud, the 11 above is already loud but 9/10 is too low so I 
need to regulate it on the sound box. The mixer vol control has no effect at 
all and only pcm works


meyer
